1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and bounding box

2.description: inspect distinct AR50 'arjordbr' and 'artype' codes to identify agricultural land codes

3.description: select AR50 polygons within Stavanger bbox filtered to agricultural code(s)

5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: deduplicate parcels, sort by teigid asc and limit to 10

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct AR50 agriculture/category codes (small DISTINCT) within dataset

3.description: select AR50 polygons filtered to agriculture codes identified in step 2

4.description: reduce AR50 agriculture polygons to Stavanger extent

5.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

6.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced agricultural AR50 polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid using min(teigid) to deduplicate

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%stavanger%';

2.sql: SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr, artype FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" ORDER BY arjordbr NULLS LAST LIMIT 100;

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: inspect AR50 category columns to find the agricultural land code/value (DISTINCT arjordbr, artype)

4.description: select AR50 polygons filtered by the chosen agricultural category (will use value found in step 3)

5.description: reduce AR50 agricultural polygons to the Stavanger municipality extent (join kommuner step1 with AR50 step4)

6.description: find parcels (teig) that intersect the reduced AR50 agricultural polygons (join teig step2 with AR50 reduced step5)

7.description: collapse to one row per teig (group by teigid) to avoid duplicates
